description: This is an HTML file serving as the front-end interface for a database visualizer, containing HTML structure, CSS styling, and embedded JavaScript for dynamic interactions with the database API.

methods.name: loadDatabases
methods.description: Fetches the list of databases and populates the sidebar.

methods.name: toggleDatabase
methods.description: Expands or collapses the list of tables for a specific database.

methods.name: loadTables
methods.description: Fetches and displays tables for a selected database.

methods.name: loadTableData
methods.description: Fetches and displays data from a specific table.

methods.name: renderTable
methods.description: Renders the fetched data into an HTML table with interactive features.

methods.name: renderCell
methods.description: Creates table cell HTML with special handling for objects and long content.

methods.name: expandCell
methods.description: Expands or collapses table cell content for large data.
